steps.title: Find the upper bound
steps.content:
The third side must be less than the sum of the two given sides.
$$x<8+15=23$$

steps.title: Find the lower bound
steps.content:
The smaller given side plus the third side must be greater than the larger given side.
$$8+x>15$$
So $x>7$.

steps.title: Combine the bounds
steps.content:
Both conditions must be true at the same time.
$$7The answer is C.
